description_long: This is a plush toy shaped like a small, stylized elephant with a rounded, light blue body and short legs. Its trunk is short and slightly curved, and it features large, floppy ears with orange patches on the tips. The toy has a pair of small, round eyes and an orange band across its trunk, giving it a playful and friendly appearance. The tail is short and stubby, matching the overall soft and cuddly design. The surface appears to be made of a soft fabric, likely filled with a lightweight stuffing material. This toy would be appealing to children and could be found in parks, playgrounds, or urban family spaces.
description: A soft, light blue plush elephant toy with orange ear tips and trunk accents, featuring a rounded, cuddly body and friendly facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elephant's face, trunk, and both large ears with orange tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curve of the trunk, one visible eye, and the rounded body with the ear and leg in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, and the small tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the trunk, ear, and body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with small, round eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly forward and ears extended outward.
